title: Fix space key eating input in modals

log.context: Fix space key eating input in modals

Done. Here's a summary of what was changed:

**File:** `/mnt/data/hello-world/grazing.html`

**Change:** Added a guard at line 2318 (inside the `document.addEventListener('keydown', ...)` handler) that returns early if `document.activeElement` is a `TEXTAREA` or `INPUT`. This sits right after the existing `congressModalOpen` check, so any key — including Space, WASD, arrows, and E — is ignored by the game handler when a text field has focus.

The `e.preventDefault()` on line 2324 (Space hop) was...(truncated)
